title: Standard MCQ Template
purpose: Use this structure for every single-option MCQ added to data/questions.json.
qualityChecks: Urdu explanation is simple and exam-oriented
jsonExample:
{
  "id": "q-mdcat-bio-002",
  "testIds": ["mdcat", "nmdcat"],
  "groupId": "medical-entry-tests",
  "skillId": "science-concepts",
  "subjectId": "biology",
  "topicId": "cell-biology",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "questionType": "MCQ",
  "examStyle": "MDCAT-style",
  "timeLimit": 45,
  "sourceType": "original",
  "status": "draft",
  "stem": "Question stem here?",
  "options": ["Correct option", "Distractor 1", "Distractor 2", "Distractor 3"],
  "answerIndex": 0,
  "explanation": "Explain why the correct option is right.",
  "urduExplanation": "اردو میں مختصر اور واضح وضاحت لکھیں۔"
}

title: Vocabulary In Context Template
purpose: Use for synonyms, antonyms, sentence completion and contextual vocabulary questions.
qualityChecks: Do not make two options equally close
Mention the clue word in explanation
jsonExample:
{
  "stem": "In the sentence, 'The argument was coherent,' coherent means:",
  "options": ["Logical and clear", "Angry", "Incomplete", "Very long"],
  "answerIndex": 0,
  "explanation": "Coherent means logically connected and clear.",
  "urduExplanation": "Coherent کا مطلب منطقی طور پر مربوط اور واضح ہے۔"
}

title: Quantitative Question Template
purpose: Use for percentages, ratios, algebra, functions, data interpretation and formula-based MCQs.
qualityChecks: Numbers should be solvable without long calculation
Urdu explanation should clarify formula use
jsonExample:
{
  "stem": "A value increases from 80 to 100. What is the percentage increase?",
  "options": ["25%", "20%", "30%", "15%"],
  "answerIndex": 0,
  "explanation": "Increase is 20. Percentage increase = 20/80 x 100 = 25%.",
  "urduExplanation": "اصل قیمت 80 ہے، اضافہ 20 ہے؛ 20/80 کو 100 سے ضرب دیں تو 25% بنتا ہے۔"
}

title: Review Before Publishing
purpose: Use this checklist before changing status from draft to published.
